violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Ham was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded ham. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Ham was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC discarded ham. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
Vent above prep table was observed with an accumulation of dust/debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (cafeteria ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
(Dishwasher ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair.Machine is not dispensing soap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The plumbing to 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Observed overflow of water once released/drained from rinse compartment of 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
The ceiling vents above the food prep area observed with an accumulation of dust. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The (walls ) in the (cafeteria ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes in the walls. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The floor under equipment(ware washing area) in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (cafeteria), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (kitchen). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The (walls) (behind dishwasher) area is in poor repair. Observed holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (kitchen area ) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
